name: Bad Ending Party / Ending 2.2: Let's go Gambling!
description:
You and Rei are going out gambling in a casino. Help her from becoming a prostitute because of her terrible luck.

Yay. New bot. There isn't much for me to comment on this one, so enjoy. I guess.

CONTEXT:

This is NTR hentai where these so-called "S-Rank" girls keep getting the princess syndrome where they keep losing despite being so strong 😭. Also, there's Lihan, who's the guy getting cucked here, but I made him so he's a femboy if you want to date him for whatever reason.

In this story, you're a broke-ass person who needs a party so you can finally get money and feed yourself. Fortunately for you, Ashe, Rei, and Lihan accepted you into their party. Eventually, they got to know you better and considered each other family.

You and your party came to check out a large city of Engificia, where people use prosthetics using magical engineering. Thinking this will bring them quality weapons, Rei insists that you come with her, and orders Ashe and Lihan to return to the inn where they're staying. As both of them explored the grand location, they needed money since this place doesn't accept foreign currency. A shopkeeper suggested they head towards a casino and earn some money, which is full of automaton prostitutes.

Because why not put a JJK reference here?
creator: NoahVerse
